Lam names Micron as a memory customer for wafer fabrication equipment
Lam names Samsung as a memory and foundry customer
Lam names SK hynix as a memory customer
Lam names TSMC as a foundry customer
Lam names GlobalFoundries as a foundry customer
Lam names Intel as a foundry customer
AMD EPYC Venice taped out on TSMC N2; manufacturing partnership
NVIDIA and TSMC celebrated first Blackwell wafer produced at TSMC Arizona
Qualcomm named TSMC as foundry partner for 28nm process technology
MediaTek flagship Dimensity SoC taped out on TSMC 3nm process
Micron HBM4 volume shipments designed for NVIDIA Vera Rubin
Applied supplies American-made chipmaking equipment to TI U.S. factories under Apple's semiconductor supply-chain effort
Applied EPIC partner named in semiconductor R&D and technology-transfer program
Applied EPIC partner named in semiconductor R&D and technology-transfer program
Applied EPIC partner named in semiconductor R&D and technology-transfer program
Applied EPIC partner named in semiconductor R&D and technology-transfer program

TSMC joined ASML customer co-investment program for next-generation lithography R&D; ASML disclosed aggregate Intel/TSMC/Samsung equity and R&D commitments
Samsung committed EUR 276M R&D funding and EUR 503M for a 3% ASML equity stake
Intel listed ASML among its 2024 EPIC Distinguished Supplier Award recipients, recognizing ASML's role in Intel's supply chain and foundry roadmap.
Canon said TSMC recognized its production support, timely equipment supply and new-function development for semiconductor lithography systems.
Nikon said it earned Intel's 2024 EPIC Distinguished Supplier Award with safety distinction as part of Intel's trusted supply chain.
Tokyo Electron said TSMC honored it for technology collaboration and production support tied to its semiconductor equipment portfolio.
Kokusai Electric said TSMC recognized its continuous supply of semiconductor manufacturing equipment and technical support.
Intel listed ASM among its 2024 EPIC Outstanding Supplier Award recipients, recognizing ASM's semiconductor equipment partnership with Intel.

src: Axcelis / Texas Instruments supplier excellence award
detail: Axcelis said TI recognized its ion implantation products and services under the 2023 Supplier Excellence Award program.
Veeco said it received Intel's 2025 EPIC supplier award as part of several semiconductor business wins highlighted in its first-quarter 2025 results.
Onto Innovation said TSMC recognized its process-control systems and supply-chain execution with an Excellent Production Support award.

src: Kulicke & Soffa / ROHM hybrid bonding process
detail: Kulicke & Soffa and ROHM said they developed a CuFirst hybrid bonding process using K&S thermo-compression technology for advanced semiconductor packaging.
CHIPS Act direct funding award for Micron Idaho and New York fabs
CHIPS Act direct funding for Intel commercial semiconductor manufacturing and advanced packaging
CHIPS Act direct funding award for TSMC Arizona
CHIPS Act funding for GlobalFoundries New York expansion and Vermont modernization
Cerebras and G42 strategic partnership for Condor Galaxy AI supercomputers; CG-3 uses 64 CS-3 systems
Multi-year OpenAI deal for 750MW of Cerebras high-speed inference compute, valued at more than $20B
Multi-year AWS partnership to bring Cerebras fast inference through AWS using Trainium 3 prefill and CS-3 decode
NVIDIA invested $2B in CoreWeave Class A common stock
CoreWeave AI factories are built on NVIDIA infrastructure with deeper platform and software alignment
Non-exclusive licensing agreement for Groq inference technology; reported deal value about $20B
Samsung Foundry contracted as Groq's next-generation silicon partner using SF4X 4nm
Partnership to build a large AI inferencing data center in Saudi Arabia using Groq LPU technology
BlackRock was a significant investor in Groq's $750M financing; BlackRock also led the 2024 $640M round
Cisco continued support in Groq's $750M financing after participating as a strategic investor
Samsung continued support in Groq's $750M financing through Samsung Catalyst Fund
Samsung Foundry selected to manufacture Tenstorrent next-generation AI chiplets on SF4X 4nm

Kia invested $20M as part of Hyundai/Kia's $50M investment in Tenstorrent
Samsung Catalyst Fund co-led Tenstorrent's $100M strategic financing up-round
SoftBank Corp. named first customer to deploy SambaNova SN50 in next-generation AI data centers in Japan
SambaNova and Intel planned a multi-year collaboration for cloud-scale AI inference
Graphcore acquired by SoftBank Group and continued as a wholly owned subsidiary
Marvell demonstrated 2nm silicon IP produced on TSMC's 2nm process for AI and cloud infrastructure
Broadcom completed VMware acquisition; VMware common stock ceased NYSE trading
Apple says Amkor will package Apple silicon produced at the nearby TSMC fab; Apple is the largest customer
Amkor will package Apple silicon from TSMC Arizona; Apple is first and largest customer of the Peoria facility
Apple represented approximately 89% of Cirrus Logic fiscal 2025 net sales through contract manufacturers
Apple represented approximately 47% of Qorvo fiscal 2025 revenue through contract manufacturers
Samsung represented approximately 10% of Qorvo fiscal 2025 revenue
Snapdragon 8 Gen1 family was dual-sourced across Samsung 4LPX and TSMC N4
MediaTek planned to use Intel Foundry Services to manufacture chips for smart edge devices
MediaTek automotive SoCs integrate NVIDIA GPU chiplets plus NVIDIA AI and graphics IP
Realtek disclosed WLAN chipsets built on a TSMC CMOS process
UNISOC represented 15% of CEVA revenue in 2025 and 2024
MaxLinear Rushmore DSP family developed on Samsung Foundry leading-edge CMOS
MaxLinear and GCT partnered on next-generation 5G FWA and converged gateways
Semtech completed all-cash acquisition of Sierra Wireless for approximately $1.2B enterprise value
Broadcom created its 3.5D XDSiP platform on TSMC technology and tools; TSMC cited years of collaboration
NVIDIA invested $2B in Marvell as part of NVLink Fusion AI infrastructure partnership
Marvell will provide custom XPUs and NVLink Fusion-compatible scale-up networking for NVIDIA AI infrastructure
Astera optimized Scorpio PCIe 6 fabric switches and Aries retimers for NVIDIA Blackwell-based MGX platforms
Astera names TSMC among primary design and manufacturing partners
Astera names AWS among primary design and manufacturing partners
Astera names Intel among primary design and manufacturing partners

src: Synopsys / Astera Labs cloud design case
detail: Synopsys Cloud supported Astera Labs chip design with FlexEDA tools and compute licensing
Credo says it partners with Microsoft on HiWire Switch AEC and open-source implementation for reliable dual-ToR architecture

src: Credo Intel AI data center blog 2023
detail: Intel first-generation Gaudi cluster connected with over one thousand Credo HiWire AECs
Credo completed acquisition of DustPhotonics, adding silicon photonics PIC technology
Lattice introduced sensor-bridging reference design using NVIDIA Jetson Orin and IGX Orin platforms
Long-term technology partnership for non-volatile products and other Lattice product lines
Samsung receives broad access to the Rambus patent portfolio through late 2033
SK hynix license extension gives broad access to Rambus innovations through mid-2034
Micron patent license extension provides access to the Rambus patent portfolio through late 2029
Allegro completed acquisition of Crocus Technology for $420M in cash
Strategic agreement for Allegro to utilize UMC for foundry technology and manufacturing
Sanken remained Allegro's largest shareholder after ownership decreased from about 50.8% to 32.5%
Samsung Foundry provides 5nm process technology for Ambarella's CV3-AD685 automotive AI central domain controller
Long-term sourcing and co-development agreement for Ambarella edge AI technology across Hanwha product lines; potential revenue exceeds $800M over more than ten years
Silicon Labs disclosed TSMC as a primary wafer manufacturing partner
Silicon Labs disclosed SMIC as a primary wafer manufacturing partner
Skyworks completed acquisition of Silicon Labs' Infrastructure & Automotive business in a $2.75B all-cash asset transaction
Nordic disclosed its nRF54L Series uses TSMC 22ULL process technology
Nordic disclosed its nRF54H Series uses GlobalFoundries 22FDX process technology
Nordic licensed and deployed CEVA DSP technology in its nRF91 low-power cellular IoT SoC
Espressif licensed and deployed CEVA RivieraWaves Bluetooth dual-mode technology in the ESP32 IoT chip
Himax disclosed TSMC among foundries used for foundry services
Himax disclosed UMC among foundries used for foundry services
CEVA, Himax Imaging and emza partnered on the WiseEye ultra-low-power always-on vision sensor for IoT
Synaptics completed acquisition of assets and manufacturing rights associated with Broadcom's wireless IoT business
onsemi entered a definitive agreement to acquire Synaptics in an all-stock transaction valued at about $7B; expected close mid-2027 subject to approvals
Infineon and TSMC collaborated on RRAM technology for next-generation automotive microcontrollers
TSMC, Bosch, Infineon and NXP established the ESMC joint venture to build a 300mm fab in Dresden for automotive and industrial demand.
STMicroelectronics and TSMC collaborated to accelerate GaN technology commercialization
Analog Devices and TSMC expanded their long-term manufacturing partnership to enhance wafer capacity and supply resilience.
Microchip expanded its partnership with TSMC to strengthen manufacturing capacity and supply assurance for its semiconductor products.
DB HiTek cites Texas Instruments among long-running technology transfer and product supply partners
Vanguard International Semiconductor signed a GaN technology licensing agreement with TSMC
Micron and Powerchip Semiconductor Manufacturing agreed to a long-term foundry relationship and site transaction
Kioxia and Western Digital continued their long-running NAND flash joint-venture relationship
Micron and Nanya Technology formed a memory technology joint venture
Melexis identifies X-FAB as a key wafer-source partner for its automotive semiconductor production
Macronix reported TSMC among its production and foundry partners
Tower Semiconductor and Renesas cooperated on specialty process and manufacturing programs
Winbond and Toshiba collaborated on DRAM technology transfer and development
SilTerra has supplied foundry capacity for MaxLinear products
ROHM and TSMC partnered on GaN power-semiconductor technology and volume production
Renesas and TSMC collaborated on semiconductor manufacturing and process technology programs
GigaDevice uses TSMC as a foundry partner for advanced process technology
Littelfuse acquired onsemi product lines including ignition IGBT, TVS diode and thyristor portfolios
Macronix and Mitsubishi Electric collaborated on semiconductor product development
Toshiba Electronic Devices & Storage is part of Toshiba's device business
Infineon and NXP joined TSMC and Bosch in the ESMC joint venture to build a 300mm semiconductor fab in Dresden.
VIS and NXP established the VSMC joint venture in Singapore to build a 300mm fab for mixed-signal, power-management and analog products.
VIS entered a foundry agreement with Monolithic Power Systems to produce power semiconductors using its Singapore and Taiwan wafer fabs.

src: Diodes acquires onsemi South Portland fab
detail: Diodes completed the acquisition of onsemi's South Portland wafer fabrication facility and operations under a continuing wafer supply arrangement.

src: Vishay acquires Infineon infrared components business
detail: Vishay agreed to acquire Infineon's infrared components business, including development, marketing and manufacturing assets.
Power Integrations says it is collaborating with NVIDIA to accelerate 800VDC power and megawatt-scale AI data-center racks using PowiGaN technology.
Synopsys and TSMC said their certified EDA flows and silicon-proven IP are being used to accelerate next-generation AI and advanced-node designs.
Synopsys completed its acquisition of Ansys and now operates the simulation software business within its portfolio.
Cadence and TSMC said they are deepening collaboration around AI-driven advanced-node design flows, 3D-IC and silicon-proven IP.

src: Siemens EDA / TSMC AI semiconductor design collaboration
detail: Siemens EDA said it is continuing its collaboration with TSMC to advance AI-powered automation and advanced semiconductor design enablement.
Keysight and Samsung demonstrated an end-to-end AI-RAN validation workflow with NVIDIA for large-scale wireless and AI-native network testing.
Wolfspeed and GE Aerospace announced a collaboration to accelerate adoption of high-voltage silicon-carbide power solutions.
Navitas said it is collaborating in the NVIDIA MGX ecosystem to accelerate 800VDC AI infrastructure and rack power delivery.
Alpha and Omega Semiconductor said its power products support NVIDIA's 800VDC power architecture for next-generation AI factories.
Renesas completed its acquisition of Altium and now owns the PCB design software business.
Renesas completed its acquisition of Transphorm and added its GaN power semiconductor business to the portfolio.

src: Synopsys supports new Arm AGI CPU
detail: Synopsys said its full-stack EDA, IP and hardware-assisted verification solutions support Arm's new AGI CPU platform.
Cadence joined Arm Total Design to help accelerate Arm-based SoC design, verification and implementation for custom silicon customers.
Andes and Imagination showcased Android 15 running on a high-performance RISC-V platform combining Andes CPU technology with Imagination GPU IP.
SiFive said its RISC-V compute platforms will integrate with NVIDIA NVLink Fusion to target scalable AI data-center systems.

src: Alphawave Semi joins Arm Total Design
detail: Alphawave Semi joined Arm Total Design to pair Arm Neoverse compute subsystems with its connectivity IP and chiplet platforms for AI infrastructure.
Qualcomm completed its acquisition of Alphawave Semi on December 18, 2025, and Alphawave shares were delisted on December 19, 2025.
Intel named KLA a 2024 EPIC Distinguished Supplier Award recipient in its trusted supply chain.
Camtek said it was one of only 37 Intel EPIC Supplier Award recipients across Intel's global supply chain.
Nova and Samsung Electronics said their joint metrology paper won the Vladimir Ukraintsev Award at SPIE Advanced Lithography 2025.
Hitachi High-Tech received Intel's 2024 EPIC Valued Supplier Award for Technology.
Lasertec said it was one of only 41 Intel EPIC Supplier Award recipients in 2026.
Advantest won TSMC's Excellent Performance Award for production support, highlighting an expanded partnership.
Teradyne and Tokyo Electron introduced an integrated test cell for AI and data-center device screening.
The Xcerra merger became effective on October 1, 2018, with Xcerra continuing as a wholly owned subsidiary of Cohu.
ASE and SPIL combined under ASE Technology Holding, bringing SPIL into the ASE group.
JCET's corporate overview lists STATS ChipPAC as part of the company's build-out into a global OSAT platform.
Micron and Powertech highlighted their long-running memory packaging partnership while announcing joint green-manufacturing work in Taiwan.

src: Tongfu / AMD packaging and test JV
detail: Tongfu signed agreements with AMD and formed a packaging and testing joint venture to support AMD products.
Huatian lists its Xi'an operation as part of its advanced packaging and test footprint.
ChipMOS integrated ThaiLin's display-driver and testing capabilities into its backend semiconductor service platform.
Amkor and King Yuan announced a strategic agreement covering subcontracting and cooperation across assembly and test services.
UTAC and Amkor entered a global cross-license agreement covering semiconductor assembly and test intellectual property.
Carsem's company profile states that it operates as part of Malaysian Pacific Industries.
Hana Micron's global manufacturing footprint includes its Vietnam backend packaging and assembly operation.
Nepes presents Nepes Ark as part of its wafer-level packaging and test affiliate structure.
Shin-Etsu's group network lists Shin-Etsu Handotai as its semiconductor wafer subsidiary.
SUMCO announced a long-term agreement with TSMC covering supply and capacity support for silicon wafers.
GlobalWafers completed its acquisition of SunEdison Semiconductor to expand its global silicon wafer footprint.
Siltronic's shareholder information shows Wacker Chemie as the controlling strategic shareholder.
SK siltron's silicon carbide business is operated through SK Siltron CSS in the United States.
Soitec and Powerchip entered a strategic collaboration to expand RF-SOI capacity for mobile and connectivity markets.
Japan Investment Corporation announced its tender offer structure to take JSR private through JIC Capital affiliates.
TOK lists TOKYO OHKA KOGYO AMERICA as its U.S. manufacturing and sales subsidiary for photoresists and high-purity chemicals.
Merck operates its semiconductor materials and electronics business under the EMD Electronics brand.
Entegris completed its acquisition of CMC Materials to expand CMP and specialty materials capabilities.
Qnity said it would showcase semiconductor technologies at the SK hynix booth during SEMICON Korea 2026.
Fujifilm groups its semiconductor process chemicals and materials under its electronic materials business.
Air Liquide serves semiconductor fabs through its dedicated Electronics business for ultra-high-purity gases and materials.
Linde said it would expand supply of industrial gases to Samsung's semiconductor facilities in South Korea.

src: Air Products gas supply for Samsung fab
detail: Air Products announced new gas supply support for Samsung's semiconductor fab expansion in South Korea.
Resonac's current semiconductor materials business includes the former Hitachi Chemical operations brought into the renamed group.
Intel recognized Ibiden for quality and delivery in advanced packaging substrates and related critical parts supply.
Unimicron's related-enterprises page lists Amcorp Technology within its group structure.

src: JICC-04 tender offer for Shinko Electric
detail: JICC-04 launched the tender offer to acquire Shinko Electric and take the company private.
AT&S and Intel announced strategic collaboration around IC substrates and advanced packaging capacity.
Coherent announced a strategic partnership with NVIDIA to develop optics technology for scaling next-generation data center architecture.
Lumentum said it completed its acquisition of NeoPhotonics on August 3, 2022.
Intel markets silicon photonics as its own volume-proven optical I/O platform and product division.
MACOM completed the acquisition of OMMIC's facilities, capabilities and technologies to form its European Semiconductor Center.
Marvell completed its acquisition of Inphi, bringing high-speed optical interconnect technology into Marvell's portfolio.
Ayar Labs and GlobalFoundries established a strategic collaboration to co-develop and commercialize optical I/O solutions.
Lightmatter and GlobalFoundries partnered to mass produce the Passage silicon photonics platform for AI interconnects.
Marvell completed its acquisition of Celestial AI and brought its Photonic Fabric technology into Marvell's data center group.

src: POET completes acquisition of Super Photonics Xiamen
detail: POET completed its acquisition of Super Photonics Xiamen and took full ownership of the optical engine operation.

src: BIS adds YMTC to Entity List
detail: The U.S. Bureau of Industry and Security added Yangtze Memory Technologies to the Entity List.
Innotron is the operating and holding platform behind ChangXin Memory Technologies' DRAM manufacturing business.

src: Montage / Intel CXL and server platform collaboration
detail: Montage announced interoperability and ecosystem work with Intel around server memory interface and CXL-related platforms.
SenseTime said its SenseNova Seko models were adapted to Cambricon and highlighted the strategic partnership between the two companies.
Deepin said deepin 23 completed adaptation to the LoongArch architecture used by Loongson processors.

src: BIS Entity List entry for Biren
detail: BIS lists Beijing Biren Technology Development Co., Ltd. on the Entity List as part of U.S. export controls.
Horizon Robotics and CARIAD announced a China-focused joint venture for ADAS and autonomous driving systems.
GalaxyCore says GalaxyCore Semiconductor (Shanghai) is its wholly owned specialty CIS manufacturing subsidiary.
Sanechips' English site links LeapRise within its company structure and affiliated platform navigation.
Akrion's surface preparation business was acquired by NAURA, creating NAURA Akrion as a wholly owned U.S. subsidiary.
AMEC's corporate materials reference its Beijing equipment entity within the group's process equipment operations.
ACM Research's investor materials describe the Shanghai operating base that manufactures and supports its semiconductor process tools.

src: Piotech supplier award from Hua Hong
detail: Piotech highlighted receiving a supplier award from Hua Hong, reflecting active deposition tool supply into Hua Hong fabs.
Powerchip announced its semiconductor manufacturing partnership with Tata Electronics for the planned India fab.
Renesas and CG Power expanded their India partnership to include OSAT and semiconductor manufacturing support.
Kaynes Technology markets Kaynes Semicon as its semiconductor and OSAT-focused operating arm.
MosChip's company overview describes its Singapore-based MosChip Global design and services subsidiary.
Tejas Networks completed its acquisition of Saankhya Labs to add wireless communications and semiconductor IP capabilities.
Vedanta announced the addition of semiconductor and display ventures to its portfolio through its group-owned SPVs.
Natronix states that its India OSAT facility is SPEL Semiconductor Limited.
OmniVision's automotive image-sensor platform is positioned for use with NVIDIA DRIVE autonomous driving systems.
